name: hvPlot (High-Level Plotting with HoloViews)

performance.notes: Interactive plots via Bokeh backend; large datasets use datashader for rasterization

agent_readiness.notes: High-level plotting API that works with pandas, Dask, xarray, GeoPandas, cuDF, and Streamz. Adds .hvplot accessor to DataFrames. Single API for line, scatter, bar, histogram, kde, violin, box, heatmap, image, quadmesh, points, polygons. Renders via Bokeh (interactive) or Matplotlib (static). Integrates with Panel for dashboards. Works with large datasets via Datashader. Part of HoloViz ecosystem.

gotchas: API consistency differs from pandas .plot() despite similar intent
Some plot types require additional HoloViz packages
Bokeh backend needed for interactive features (not pure matplotlib)
Large dataset support requires datashader installed separately
best_when: Interactive exploratory data analysis with pandas/xarray
Quick interactive plots without verbose Bokeh/Plotly code
Large dataset visualization via Datashader rasterization
avoid_when: Teams needing simple pandas .plot() drop-in (subtle API differences)
summary: hvPlot provides a high-level .hvplot accessor for pandas, Dask, xarray, and GeoPandas DataFrames. Unified API for interactive plots via Bokeh with minimal code. Supports large dataset rasterization via Datashader. Integrates with Panel for dashboards. Part of the HoloViz ecosystem alongside HoloViews, Panel, and Datashader. Best for interactive EDA without verbose Bokeh code.
